Index JUIT Waknaghat Search Login Register x Home About Us About us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Alumni Services Member Benefits Request Forms Distinguished Alumni Alumni Achievements Alumni Awards Directory News and Updates News & Updates Alumni Stories Events Upcoming Events Past Events Gallery Albums Videos Engage Jobs/Internships Scholarship Contact Us Event Details Home Events Upcoming Events Webinar by Mr. Sandeep Rajoriya Go Back Oct, 23 2021 at 11:00 am GMeet Webinar by Mr. Sandeep Rajoriya Mr. Sandeep Rajoriya, an alumnus of the 2015 batch. In his third year of engineering, while working on a few University projects, he acquired a strong interest in Civil Services, and instead of pursuing a traditional campus placement, he began preparing for his UPSC journey. He secured an AIR - 290 in UPSC CSE 2020 and was recently felicitated by the Chief Minister and the Education Minister of Madhya Pradesh for his achievement. About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
